contact.title: Start a Conversation
contact.description: Fill out the form below and I'll get back to you ASAP

name.label: Full Name
name.help_text: Enter your full name (2-50 characters, letters only)

validation.min: Full name must be at least 2 characters
validation.max: Full name must be at most 50 characters
validation.format: Full name can only contain letters and spaces

validation.invalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.min: Email must be at least 5 characters
validation.max: Email must be at most 100 characters

validation.min: Subject must be at least 5 characters
validation.max: Subject must be at most 100 characters

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Hi Gustavo, I'm interested in developing a new React application for my business. Could we schedule a call to discuss the requirements?

validation.min: Message must be at least 20 characters
validation.max: Message must be at most 600 characters

contact.submit_button_help: Submit the contact form to send your message

success.title: Message sent successfully!
success.description: Thank you for contacting me. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

warning.title: Failed to send message
warning.description: There was a problem sending your message. Please try again later or send an email to contact@gsebold.com

error.title: Unexpected error
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Send an email to contact@gsebold.com
